privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetically generated patient data, not real patient information. The DrTuxTest database contains 20-25 randomly generated patients per run with data spread across two tables (IndexNomPrenom and fchpat). The data includes realistic French names, addresses from 8 major French cities, birth years from 1940-2005, and intentionally includes ~15% missing addresses and ~20% missing phone numbers to test data handling. Ground truth statistics are captured at generation time in /tmp/ground_truth.json. The task requires merging source tables into a normalized 'patient_export' table with 13 English-named columns and exporting results to ~/Documents/patient_export.csv and ~/Documents/migration_summary.txt.
